item.title: MeathGAA: Meath GAA @MeathGAA · 23min The result may not have gone the way we wanted today in our Leinster Senior Football Champio
item.description:
Meath GAA @MeathGAA · 23min The result may not have gone the way we wanted today in our Leinster Senior Football Championship Quarter-Final against Westmeath but the support of the Royal Army was outstanding as always.
We will regroup and go again in the All-Ireland Series where once more, your support Mostrar más 1 10 947

item.title: StatsAndSolos: Stats and Solos @StatsAndSolos · 24min Down to 40% now Cita Stats and Solos @StatsAndSolos · 29 mar. All Ireland Qualifi
item.description:
Stats and Solos @StatsAndSolos · 24min Down to 40% now Cita Stats and Solos @StatsAndSolos · 29 mar. All Ireland Qualification chances. Down are at 60%. The likely outcome, but far from a foregone conclusion.
It's easy to overestimate their chances because every event that can push them out is in itself is very unlikely, but they all add up. The chance of any outsider making a 1 732
